ab: a nia kinaizuanan a tjumaq i tainan.

en: There are five people in our family.

ab: i tua nia taqumaqanan matjelu a men a mare siruvetjek.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: na kitevelj aken tjai kama kina kaka tjavulung a uqaljay kata vavayan.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: qacaqaca a ku kama, a ku kama. taizing.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: mariljay a ku kina, a ku kina. kuisang.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: nu i tjumaq ti kama penayuwanan nu ikai tja nu amen.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the paiwan language with us at home.

ab: nu kalja pulavayan vaik a men a maqinaljan.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: maciyur aken kata ku kaka tjavulung a djemameq ta qubequb.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: tjengelay aken aravac ta niamen a cemkemkelj.
en: I like our family very much.
